title: Debug testbench
body:
hi,
I think i am in the right way, you guide me.
Thanks alot.
To load memory without using DPI, i modify my verilog by adding the following code:
```
 reg [31:0] dspm [0:4095]; // @[dspm.scala 35:20:@2132.4]
  initial $readmemh("/home/hounaida.rekik/Desktop/Flexpret3/flexpret-master/tests/Hello/build/emulator/hello.data.mem", dspm);
```
As a first step, int generates modules which contains
 `VL_READMEM_W `
in my testbench i want to be sure that the memory are loaded.
there is a debug function or tool for that ??
Thanks for your help
